body_transformation: The turtle shell transforms into a sleek, angular electric blue carapace with jagged lightning-bolt spines running along its spine, while the pale blue shell accents become vibrant yellow circuit patterns glowing with neon green energy. The rounded head retains its silhouette but gains sharp, angular facial features with pointed ears tipped in sparking yellow fur. The stubby legs now have wiry, lean musculature with glowing neon green circuit lines tracing their contours, and the curled tail tip now crackles with electric sparks. The beige underbelly shifts to a smooth electric blue surface with faint neon green circuitry patterns subtly integrated into its texture.
signature_feature: Shell spines: jagged lightning-bolt shaped electric blue spines with neon green circuit patterns and sparking tips.
